ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "dealer_code" INTEGER /* Dealer code for the dealership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the vehicle */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., 600, 900) */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Gixxer, Access 125) */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant of the vehicle (e.g., SP Rear Disc, Drum) */,
  "variant_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle variant */,
  "invoiced_on" TEXT /* Date and time the vehicle was invoiced */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vehicle was created */,
  "chassis_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vehicle's chassis */,
  "engine_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vehicle's engine */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was produced */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty for the vehicle expires */,
  "is_test_driven" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the vehicle has been test-driven */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_dealer_code FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_code") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealer_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_model FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_model") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_variant FOREIGN KEY ("variant") REFERENCES variants ("variant_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_variant_color FOREIGN KEY ("variant_color") REFERENCES colors ("color_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealer_code" INTEGER /* Dealer code for the dealership */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the dealership */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the dealership */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dealership (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Individual, Business) */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "engine_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity of the model */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type supported by the model */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission supported by the model */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the model */,
  "is_electric" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the model is electric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle variant */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the variant belongs */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the variant */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the variant */,
  "is_special_edition" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the variant is a special edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color */,
  "rgb_code" TEXT /* RGB code of the color */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the color is a custom color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale after applying the discount and tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "is_low_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether a low stock alert has been triggered */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the sales representative works */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate for the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
